scope.restriction: Scratch artifact only; no canonical data or UI files edited.

methodology.rankMoveBasis: Compared existing currentAlphaRank against 2026-06-02 YTD rerating, market-cap consensus risk, role directness, and current official/primary AI-infrastructure evidence available on 2026-06-03.
methodology.sourcePreference: Company IR/news and filings first, then official exchange/company pages, then primary ecosystem sources such as IEA, NVIDIA, TSMC, Micron, Cadence, Murata, and Equinix.

uiHoverFieldsNeeded.purpose: Show an up/down/hold badge or arrow beside current alpha rank in table and scatter hovers.
One-line explanation for the rank badge without opening the expanded row.
Display freshness of the bull/neutral/bear audit.
Bull thesis shown in hover or compact popover.
Neutral/base-case thesis shown in hover or compact popover.
Bear thesis shown in hover or compact popover.
Concise catalyst text for hover summary.
Concise risk text for hover summary.
Short tags to keep hover scannable.
One to three source links for hover footnotes or expanded detail.
